name: Sea Leopard (SS-483)
events: 6 Sep 0945 USS Sea Leopard (Cdr. R.E.M. Ward, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for Key West, Florida.
25 Jul 1945 USS Sea Leopard (Cdr. R.E.M. Ward, USN) shifted from the Portsmouth Navy Yard to Newport, Rhode Island to conduct torpedo trials.
28 Jul 1945 Having completed her torpedo trials, USS Sea Leopard (Cdr. R.E.M. Ward, USN) shifted from Newport, Rhode Island to New London, Connecticut.
10 Sep 1945 USS Sea Leopard (Cdr. R.E.M. Ward, USN) arrived at Key West, Florida from New London, Connecticut.
